rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft British Museum, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Readings for midnight during Passion Week
Readings for the eleventh night hour
Comment on The Wisdom of Solomon 2:6-22
Admonition by John Chrysostom concerning the treason of Judas
Song of Moses and Song of the Three Children
Readings for the third night hour
